What's going on everyone? Okay, so we're going to start with a 42-day detox play and explaining the nutrition and meal plan. So, when these people come in, you should have a printed out version or multiple printed out versions that you can walk them through so they understand it. I would have one of each style printed out and you should be meeting with small groups anyway, so that should be more than enough. You'll notice that we have three sizes and your portal will look different than this, but there are three sizes. There's essentially small, medium, large. That's one, one and a half, and two. What I have in front of me is the one, which is a 1200 calorie base. So one is 1200, one and a half is 1800, and two is 2400 calories per day. If you're wondering how do I divide this out, excuse me. My rough estimate of what I would split this up for is anyone who is 150 and under, I would have for the 1x. Anyone who's between 150 and 220, I would have for the 1.5. Anyone who's 220 and over, I would have for the 2x. So that gives you small, medium, large for your sizing of the meal plans and it should be very straightforward to understand from there. Now, all of these foods are low-fodment foods, meaning they're foods that have low allergenic response. So a lot of people are inflamed because they have minor food allergies. And so these are the foods that are the least likely to cause an allergenic response. And so by extension, even when you keep someone's calories the same, they usually lose three to five pounds of water weight just from inflammation and bloat, honestly, just from switching foods. And then on top of that, you add a calorie deficit into it and they lose a lot more. They also feel better because they're not dealing with food allergies, right? Minor allergies, but they add up. So the way this works, and this is what we're explaining, or what I'm explaining to you right now is that the meal plans, each one of these plans, one, the one and a half and the two, are the same plan except the portions have been adjusted so that they don't have to do any math, which is an improvement from some of our older plans where they had to do a little bit of math on their own. That being said, every week they will have the option of two meals for breakfast, two meals for lunch and two meals for dinner. So they can pick which one they want or they can have both and when they buy their groceries buy half, a half amount of each, right? So they can have, you know, they can alternate meals if they so desire. All right? So here, for week A, you have, if they wanted to get option one, then they would need this much to buy at the store. All right? So this will be the closest amount that they would need to buy and it makes it simple for them. All right? Same thing here for, you know, breakfast. Now if they want to get both of these things, they just need to cut it in half, all the portions so they can buy accordingly. I hope that makes sense. Once they know what they're going to get, this is the instructions on how to cook it or how to prepare it so that they can make it and it doesn't take a long time. It should be very straightforward here for what they need to do for each of their meals, breakfast, lunch and dinner. And this is week A. We have week A, B, C, D, E, F all the way down here. Let's see what it ends with. E, F, right. So they have six weeks worth of plans. Oops, seven, G. And if they are doing that, then this last one is pescatarian. So G is for somebody who is a pescatarian and they'll have those options available to them. All right? Now, like I said, they can go week A, week one, week B, week two. And the reason we did it letters is so that people don't get tied up with the week lettering and the week they are on and that was done by design. So if someone likes week A, they can follow week A all six weeks if they so desire. If they like week B, they can follow week B all six weeks. They don't need to switch it up. They can and they have that option and that's part of the benefit for you in selling it. But from an explanation standpoint, it is now extremely easy because now all they have to do is just pick which meals they would like. Mind you, from an overarching standpoint, these need to be communicated as examples. Okay? These are not prescriptive. These are examples of foods that would satisfy these caloric requirements, which is 1200 calories a day, 1800 calories a day or 2400 calories a day and then these corresponding macros. Okay? They are not prescriptive and I just want to be clear about that. No one is authorized to prescribe foods, to treat diseases or anything like that. This is just part of a healthy lifestyle. This is providing them examples and frameworks that they would be able to use to come up with ideas. I just want to be clear about what this is and what it is not. So, each one of these plans, you should have printed out maybe laminated and bound at your facility, one for each size and then the explanation for them. You can either choose to print them out, which I would recommend, but I know that some people are a little bit on the cheaper side. If that is you, then you're going to give them access to the online portal, which is going to have these that they can download straight to their phone so they can have them with them portably, which is still fine and they look great on mobile. So this is what the 42-day detox looks like. So when you're explaining it to them, just walk them through it, explain how this works. There's a meal plan, there's a grocery list and then there's how to cook the food. It's that simple. And then it goes to the next week. Pick the foods you want, buy the foods at the store that you're eating and then cook them accordingly. All right? So this should be, this should take even less time, which should allow you more time in the supplement sales and they should be totally blown away with how nice it looks. The Precise Labs logo is on there because most of the sales that we will be making on the back and will be Precise Labs supplement sales. So it kind of makes sense that they work together in a symbiotic relationship. But that is the 42-day detox play from a nutrition standpoint. That is how this works.
